title: スケジュール確認は入念に

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There is still some time before training... I should
review my schedule.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Oh, yes. There will be a quiz during math class on
this day.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look like I scheduled enough study time
the day before the quiz, so I should extend that
session by thirty minutes...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
If I reduce my evening workout by thirty minutes,
then that should be fine.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
But wait, I could make up for that time by
extending my workout on a different night. What
do I have scheduled for the prior week?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: I can't get my schedule to line up correctly...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps redoing it from square one is the best
course of action.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I can't train perfectly without the perfect
schedule.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Eishin Flash becomes so engrossed in fixing her
schedule that she completely forgets about
today's training session.
